description_long: This is a compact, freestanding cabinet with a matte black finish and a rectangular shape. The front features a single drawer at the top with a round knob and a louvered panel, followed by an open shelf and a lower compartment, both of which are accessible from the front. The sides and top are solid and smooth, while the back panel is made of unfinished light wood, contrasting with the rest of the cabinet. The base has a slightly recessed plinth with decorative cutouts, giving it a classic yet modern appearance. The cabinet is likely constructed from wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the drawer. Its size and design make it suitable for use as a nightstand, side table, or small storage unit in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A small, matte black wooden cabinet with a drawer, open shelf, and unfinished wood back panel. Features a round knob and decorative base cutouts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a knob, louvered panel, open shelf, and lower compartment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, smooth black panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing an unfinished light wood back panel, contrasting with the black sides and top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid black panel and no openings.
